description: Execute V0.8 Hotfix: Resolve the persistent 'npx team-agents-cowork-init' 404 error that team members are experiencing. Since the framework exposes the binary as 'agent-protocol-init' in package.json, invoking 'npx team-agents-cowork-init' causes NPM to search for a non-existent package. The fix is to add 'team-agents-cowork-init' as a bin alias mapping to 'bin/agent-protocol-init' in package.json, preventing users from needing to change their muscle-memory or copy-pasted commands.
scope: 1. Modify package.json to include 'team-agents-cowork-init' in the 'bin' object, mapping to the existing 'bin/agent-protocol-init' script. 2. Ensure documentation commands align with this alias if necessary. 3. Output updated package.json.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of the Node.js DAG execution runner (V0.9). NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of this patch progression.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify source code in src/ beyond the bin definitions.
